creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from marco.zuhl@ppvh.eu -----

To: freebsd-bugs@freebsd.org
Subject: kern/136363: [panic] panic: vm_fault: fault on nofault entr,
	addr: c1885000

Hi.

I am having the same issues with a Xen VM except a slightly other addr.

Host: uname -a
Linux xenhost2 2.6.26-2-xen-amd64 #1 SMP Mon Oct 19 04:39:01 UTC 2009
x86_64 GNU/Linux
Xen 3.3.1

VM:
HVM Mode (full virtualization)
memory = 384
vcpus=1
pae=1
apic=1
disk = [ 'file:/xen/vfreebsd-226.img,hda,w',
'file:/xen/freebsd80netboot.iso,hdc:cdrom,r']

Other people seem to be talking about a corrupted installation after the
setup on VMs such aus QEMU and VirtualPC

Is there any progress on this? Google didn't tell me much. :-/

Kind regards,

Bigfoot29

----- End forwarded message -----
